evaluatorFeedback.critical: inferVulnClass in src/orchestrator/security-scanners.ts (~lines 93-95): the FIRST ternary branch regex includes \bxss\b inside the injection alternation, so any check id containing 'xss' resolves to VulnClass 'injection' instead of the newly-added 'xss'. The 'xss' class is therefore unreachable from inferVulnClass. sc-1-3 explicitly requires 'xss'->xss.
evaluatorFeedback.fix: 1) Remove \bxss\b from the injection-branch regex alternation. 2) Add a dedicated branch, e.g. /\bxss\b|cross-site-scripting/.test(id) ? 'xss' : ... placed so it does not conflict with the injection branch. 3) Add the missing table-test row to security-scanners.test.ts: a check_id containing 'xss' (e.g. 'generic.xss.reflected-xss-rule') must yield vulnClass 'xss'. 4) Re-run tsc --noEmit, eslint src/, vitest run — keep all other criteria (sc-1-1/1-2/1-4/1-5) green.
